fields.label: Conditions Removed

log.why: Protection from Poison ends the Poisoned condition immediately, which is neither status application nor future condition immunity.

fields.comment: Lists named status conditions the spell ends immediately on a target. Use this when canonical prose says an existing condition ends, such as `end the Poisoned condition`; do not use it for preventing future conditions or suppressing conditions temporarily. It maps to `effects[].conditionRemoval[]`. Purpose: Conditions Removed exists so restorative condition-ending mechanics are not hidden in utility descriptions. Use `not_applicable` when the spell has no condition-removal mechanic.
